title: centipeda minuta
intro: Centipeda minuta, also known as the small centipede or eastern hairy centipede, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Centipeda minuta include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Centipeda minuta can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
